scripts.build: npm run build -w @vocablens/shared && npm run build -w @vocablens/extension && node scripts/package-extension.mjs && npm run build -w @vocablens/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @vocablens/shared && npm run test -w @vocablens/extension
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run validate -w @vocablens/extension
